test-method.name: verifyTheUserIsAbleToAccessAdminUsers
test-method.description: Verifies that the user can access the Admin Users section, create a new admin user, and confirms success by checking that an alert message is displayed.

test-method.name: verifyTheUserIsAbleToAccessAdminUsers
test-method.description: Verifies that the user can access the Admin Users section, create a new admin user, and confirms success by checking that an alert message is displayed.

test-method.name: verifyTheUserIsAbleToAccessAdminUsers
test-method.description: Verifies that the user can access the Admin Users section, create a new admin user, and confirms success by checking that an alert message is displayed.
